title: M1-03: Add New Line button for multi-line input
acceptance_criteria: Terminal has 'Line' or '↵' button in MobileTerminalBar
Clicking inserts newline character (\n) at cursor position
Button is secondary-styled (less prominent than Send)
deliverables: Modified MobileTerminalBar with Line button and insert logic
completed_summary: Implemented in Terminal.tsx MobileTerminalBar with Line button (lines 304-309)
